{{Quote|Ten Ewoks to slay such a giant? This long-haired monster is as big as a hut, with great fiery eyes and teeth as big as your hand and the strength of fifty Ewoks... at least!|Vulgarr|<ref name="teebo" />}}
The '''Grudakk''' was a gigantic [[Sentience/Legends|sapient]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] living on the Forest Moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. It served as the guardian of the [[Father Tree]], the largest tree in the forest. Each of its hands was the size of a young [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]], its [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] were the size of an Ewok's head, and someone chancing upon it could mistake its legs for tree trunks. The Grudakk was covered in long, thick fur. The creature lived in a vast, underground lair dug out from beneath the Father Tree. Its lair showed that is was, in fact, intelligent, with its torchlit passages, stone furniture, and bed of straw. The creature wove pouches and other items from vines.<ref name="teebo" />

As the guardian of the Father Tree, the Grudakk was a powerful ally of the Ewoks. In contrast, the [[Yuzzum/Legends|Yuzzums]] and [[Dulok/Legends|Duloks]] hated and feared the creature. When the Ewok [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] ran away from [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] to search for his sister, [[Malani]], the Grudakk saved him from a band of Yuzzum warriors. The Grudakk took Teebo back to its lair, fed him, and gave him a place to sleep. Fearing that the Grudakk planned to keep him for a pet, Teebo escaped the next day. The Grudakk tracked him to a battle between the Bright Tree Ewoks and a band of Duloks led by King [[Vulgarr/Legends|Vulgarr]]. The Grudakk secured the victory for the Ewoks by snatching up Vulgarr and frightening away the others.<ref name="teebo" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Grudakk appeared in ''[[The Adventures of Teebo: A Tale of Magic and Suspense]]'', written by [[Joe Johnston]] and released in [[1984]]. The creature's name is spelled "Grudakk" in the original source,<ref name="teebo" /> although ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' later spelled it "Grundakk."<ref name="cswe">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
